PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIMENTEL, CESAR P. $2,752.36 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,752.36, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
